title: DNA extraction (Salting out)
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"d0pvg","text":" In microtubes containing tissue fragments, add 440μL of lysis buffer (10mM Tris-HCl, 2mM EDTA, 400mM NaCl, 2% SDS) and 10 µL of proteinase K (10mg/mL);","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ce3fk","text":" Incubate in a water bath at 55°C for approximately 1:30h or overnight;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2j22p","text":" Add 300µL of NaCl (5M) and centrifuge for 10min at 10.000rpm.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dbnue","text":" Transfer supernatant containing the DNA to microcentrifuge tube (1,5mL);","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"39ool","text":" Add 500µl of 100% isopropanol. ","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2h9c1","text":" Centrifuge for 10min at 10.000rpm;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9nr64","text":" Discard the supernatant and reuse microcentrifuge tube;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6tee7","text":" Add 700µL of 70% ethanol;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1p990","text":" Centrifuge for 3min at 13.000rpm;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bqett","text":" Discard the supernatant and dry microcentrifuge tube;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"evfg","text":" Add 30 µL of sterile H2O and 5µL of RNAse (10mg/mL);","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":23,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2k76i","text":" Incubate at 37°C for 30 min o overnigth and stored at -20ºC. ","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"frpss","text":"NaCl; Tris-HCl; EDTA; Proteinase K; Ethanol; Sterile H2O; RNAse; Isopropanol; Microcentrifuge capable of at least 13.000rpm; Incubator","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":54,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Karen Guimaraes
